items.title: Galaxy Digital Seeks $3.5 Billion Debt for Texas Data Center
items.summary: Galaxy Digital Inc. is planning to raise about $3.5 billion from a debut junk-bond sale to fund a data center tied to CoreWeave Inc., extending AI borrowing’s push into the riskier corners of the US credit market.

items.title: GE Vernova Falls as Outlook Clashes With ‘Too High’ AI Hopes
items.summary: GE Vernova Inc.’s shares slumped after a higher revenue outlook failed to impress investors, a sign that it’s getting harder for companies that sell equipment to data centers to meet the market’s sky-high hopes.
